title: lamium garganicum subsp. striatum
intro: Lamium garganicum subsp. striatum, also known as striped lamium or yellow archangel, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lamium garganicum subsp. striatum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and support respiratory health. Lamium garganicum subsp. striatum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat a range of health issues, including colds, fever, and digestive problems.
